dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9537 IH: Boat Loan Interest Deduction Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Yakym (for himself and Mr. Davis of North Carolina) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to allow a deduction for loan interest payments made with respect to certain watercraft.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Boat Loan Interest Deduction Act of 2026.

section.header: Qualified passenger vehicles include certain watercraft for purposes of deduction for interest paid or accrued

subsection.text: Section 163(h)(4)(D) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended to read as follows:

clause.text: The term applicable passenger vehicle means an applicable motor vehicle or an applicable watercraft.
The term applicable motor vehicle means any vehicle—

subclause.text: the original use of which commences with the taxpayer,
which is manufactured primarily for use on public streets, roads, and highways (not including a vehicle operated exclusively on a rail or rails),
which is a car, minivan, van, sport utility vehicle, pickup truck, or motorcycle,
which is treated as a motor vehicle for purposes of title II of the Clean Air Act, and
which has a gross vehicle weight rating of less than 14,000 pounds.

clause.continuation-text: Such term shall not include any vehicle the final assembly of which did not occur within the United States.

clause.text: The term applicable watercraft means a watercraft—

subclause.text: the original use of which commences with the taxpayer,
which is a recreational vessel (as defined in section 2101 of title 46, United States Code), and
which is a motorboat (as defined in section 90.10–23 of title 46, Code of Federal Regulations, as in effect on the date of the enactment of this subparagraph).

clause.continuation-text: Such term shall not include any watercraft the final assembly of which did not occur in the United States.

subparagraph.text: by striking VIN in the heading and inserting Identification number, and
by striking the vehicle identification number of the applicable passenger vehicle described in clause (i) on the return of tax for the taxable year. and inserting

quoted-block.text: on the return of tax for the taxable year—

clause.text: the vehicle identification number in the case of an applicable motor vehicle, or
the hull identification number in the case of an applicable watercraft.

paragraph.text: in section 6050AA(b)(2)(E), by striking vehicle identification number and inserting vehicle or hull identification number.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to indebtedness incurred after December 31, 2025.
